description: NACA 0015 reconstructed from NASA/CR-20205001147 figure and equations at Reynolds ~242,000

source.name: NASA/CR-20205001147
source.notes: Reference CSV is reconstructed from Figure 7 and the text on page 10: lift-curve slope about 5.75 per radian, zero-lift angle about -0.75 deg, and the explicit Cd(alpha) approximation given in Eq. (9) up to about 12 deg.
